logs.notes: IME text logs and rotated variants.
Full Panther folder: setupact, setuperr, OOBE, Autopilot-adjacent logs.
High-value Autopilot JSON artifacts staged under ServiceState.
Measured boot logs for BitLocker troubleshooting.
Company Portal app local state and logs.
EPM MDM agent logs from system profile.
Sidecar (Win32 app) MDM logs from user profile.
MSI installer logs from Windows temp.
MSI installer logs from user temp.
Secure Boot certificate update remediation log.

registry.notes: Enrollment state and tenant-scoped enrollment metadata.
Autopilot profile and device preparation settings.
Hybrid join offline domain join application marker.
Windows Update for Business deployment service state.
Secure Boot configuration and opt-in state.

eventLogs.notes: Azure AD / Entra ID event logs.
Microsoft Defender for Endpoint SENSE operational events.

commands.notes: Delivery Optimization session and peer status.

arguments: Get-Process | Select-Object Name, FileVersion, Path, ProductVersion | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap
Get-CimInstance Win32_PnPSignedDriver | Select-Object DeviceName, DriverVersion | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap
Get-Package | Select-Object Name, Version, ProviderName, Source | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap
Get-AppxPackage -AllUsers | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'CompanyPortal|IntuneCompanyPortal|Authenticator' } | Format-List Name, Version, PackageFullName, Status, SignatureKind
commands.notes: Company Portal and Authenticator AppX package info.
MDM Diagnostic Tool output. The -zip argument path is appended at runtime.

arguments: Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem | Format-List *; Get-CimInstance Win32_ComputerSystem | Format-List *; Get-CimInstance Win32_BIOS | Format-List *

commands.notes: BitLocker status for Secure Boot cert transition impact.
